commit_scope: Make the public deploy verifier require full promoted BML native proof headers.

observations: Production now emits X-Form-Router, X-Form-Handler, and X-Form-Python-Authority for all five promoted BML read routes.
The public deploy verifier now carries expected handler names in the promoted-route table and fails unless the handler and authority headers match.
The full verifier passed against production at 842ef637; the first native canary crossed a rollout boundary and settled after three attempts.

phase_gate.reason: Local and public verifier proof passed; CI, merge, and post-merge deploy proof remain for this branch.

evidence_refs: post-PR #2783 public header probes showed full promoted BML proof headers
full public deploy verifier output at production SHA 842ef637
